title: Career Navigator
content:
Discover career possibilities and how to reach your goals.
What do you want to know about? ,
He aha ngā mea e hiahia ana koe ki te mōhio?
Videos of the month ,
Ngā ataata o te marama
Tips on how to get the job you want and career ideas to inspire you.
Kaiwhakahaere taiopenga
Planning for life after school ,
Te whakamahere i tō ao mō muri i te wehenga i te kura
Feeling unsure about what to do when you leave school? You’re not alone. We can help!
Top tools and topics ,
Ngā tino utauta me ngā tino kaupapa
Use our most popular information to reach your career goals.
Job Hunters' Workbook ,
Explore career ideas
Torotoro whakaaro aramahi

Torotoro ako me te whakangungu
Kaupapa Māori career ideas
Ngā whakaaro aramahi kaupapa Māori
Me pēhea te tuhi i tētahi tāhuhu tangata

## Career Practice Hub Pokapū Tikanga Aramahi ,
Explore activities, strategies, insights and reports that support career guidance, development and best practice.
Use these guides to help you make career decisions.
Explore what your skills and values might be.
- Featured guide How to find your career path Me pēhea te kimi i tō huarahi aramahi A step-by-step guide to exploring your values, skills and interests. It’s important to know what these are so you can choose a career path and find a job that fits with who you are.

## How to find your career path

## Me pēhea te kimi i tō huarahi aramahi
A step-by-step guide to exploring your values, skills and interests. It’s important to know what these are so you can choose a career path and find a job that fits with who you are.
- Guide Know your skills Kia mōhio ki ō pūkenga A skill is the ability to do something. If you know your skills, it’s easier to describe them to employers and convince them you’re the right person for the job.

## Kia mōhio ki ō pūkenga
A skill is the ability to do something. If you know your skills, it’s easier to describe them to employers and convince them you’re the right person for the job.
How NCEA works and how to choose subjects.
- Featured guide How NCEA works Ka pēhea te NCEA e mahi ai NCEA is the qualification most students study for at secondary school in Aotearoa. The assessments you do in Year 11, 12 and 13 are the first steps on your journey to find a career that’s best for you.

## Ka pēhea te NCEA e mahi ai
NCEA is the qualification most students study for at secondary school in Aotearoa. The assessments you do in Year 11, 12 and 13 are the first steps on your journey to find a career that’s best for you.
- Guide How to choose NCEA subjects Me pēhea te kōwhiri maraua NCEA It can be tricky choosing which NCEA subjects to study. Here are some steps to help you decide. Do these steps in any order you like.

## How to choose NCEA subjects

## Me pēhea te kōwhiri maraua NCEA
It can be tricky choosing which NCEA subjects to study. Here are some steps to help you decide. Do these steps in any order you like.
Find out ways to do study or training.
- Featured guide How to apply for study or training Me pēhea te tono mō ngā akoranga, te whakangungu rānei Ready to sign up to study or training? Tino pai! There are a few steps you need to go through – just take them one at a time, you’ll get there.

## How to apply for study or training

## Me pēhea te tono mō ngā akoranga, te whakangungu rānei
Ready to sign up to study or training? Tino pai! There are a few steps you need to go through – just take them one at a time, you’ll get there.
- Guide Study and training if you need learning support Te ako me te whakangungu ki te hiahia koe i te tautoko ako If you’re a student who is disabled, neurodivergent or needs extra learning support for any reason, there are plenty of options to help you succeed in your tertiary education goals. A wide range of support is usually available for your study or training and you can use this right through your programme or course.

## Study and training if you need learning support

## Te ako me te whakangungu ki te hiahia koe i te tautoko ako
If you’re a student who is disabled, neurodivergent or needs extra learning support for any reason, there are plenty of options to help you succeed in your tertiary education goals. A wide range of support is usually available for your study or training and you can use this right through your programme or course.
How to look for a job and get work experience.
- Featured guide How to look for a job Me pēhea te rapu mahi Looking for a job can be scary and hard. Breaking it down into small steps will make it easier to find a job that’s right for you.

## How to look for a job

## Me pēhea te rapu mahi
Looking for a job can be scary and hard. Breaking it down into small steps will make it easier to find a job that’s right for you.
- Guide How to get work experience Me pēhea te whiwhi wheako mahi Find out how to get work experience to explore your career ideas.

## How to get work experience

## Me pēhea te whiwhi wheako mahi
Find out how to get work experience to explore your career ideas.
How to get help to make a career decision.
- Featured guide How to make a career decision Me pēhea te hanga whakataunga aramahi Choosing a career path is a big deal. Here’s how to check if you’ve made the best decision.

## How to make a career decision

## Me pēhea te hanga whakataunga aramahi
Choosing a career path is a big deal. Here’s how to check if you’ve made the best decision.
- Guide How to choose study or training Me pēhea te kōwhiri i ngā mahi ako, ngā mahi whakangungu rānei You’ve found a career direction you like. Here’s how to choose the right study or training to get you on your way.

## How to choose study or training

## Me pēhea te kōwhiri i ngā mahi ako, ngā mahi whakangungu rānei
You’ve found a career direction you like. Here’s how to choose the right study or training to get you on your way.

## News Ngā rongokōrero ,
Stay up to date with the latest career news and insights.

### Guide to using Tahatū in career planning is live ,
A new practitioner-focused resource, Using Tahatū in career planning, is now available in the Career Practice Hub.

## Sign up to stay connected Waitohu mai kia noho tuihono ai ,
You can sign up to get emails from Tahatū with the latest career information, tips and resources.
